title: Outdoor Grand Oak Gas Log Set | Heat & Glo
description: Outdoor Grand Oak gas log set: a substantial six-log oak arrangement engineered for outdoor masonry fireplace openings. Weather-rated burner, vented configuration.

hero.eyebrow: OUTDOOR GRAND OAK — VENTED GAS LOG SET
hero.h1: The Grand Oak, weather-rated for the patio.
hero.lede: The Outdoor Grand Oak retrofits an existing outdoor masonry fireplace opening with a six-log oak arrangement engineered for exterior conditions. Weather-rated burner, layered flame, real flame presence on the patio without wood storage.
